title: n8n Stripe Trigger webhook forgery via missing signature verification
description: The Stripe Trigger node's webhook handler accepts and processes incoming webhook payloads without verifying the Stripe-Signature header against the webhook signing secret. Although the webhook creation flow stores the signing secret in webhookData.webhookSecret, the webhook() method never calls stripe.webhooks.constructEvent() or any equivalent HMAC-SHA256 verification, allowing any party who knows the webhook URL to forge Stripe events.
